text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm passing by the racecourse, I see a
familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Today's the day, Meek.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: The URA Finale is slowly getting closer.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Let's score a decisive win today and show
everyone you've got what it takes to be a star
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: All right... Let's do it. Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I want to help you win. I need to help you win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little worried about them, so I decide to
watch Happy Meek's race.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oh, Happy Meek is here! She's one to watch.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame she hasn't been doing too well lately.
She had such good results for a while after her
debut.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
You mean she's stuck in a rut? Boy, her trainer
must really be slacking off...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The race begins, but...

text_block_list.name: Commentator / Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Happy Meek coming from the inside! Can
she make it?! Can she make it?!

text_block_list.name: Commentator / Caster
text_block_list.text:
The leading pack is holding on! Can she outpace
them?!

text_block_list.name: Commentator / Caster
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the leader of the pack stuck it out!
Happy Meek couldn't quite go the distance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, Happy Meek comes in at third place. Something about her does seem off...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Meek. It's all my fault... again.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: No... I wasn't strong enough.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! Meek, I promise this isn't your
fault.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You're a very talented Umamusume, both
physically and mentally.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: The blame lies solely with me... your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin turns to head back home with
Happy Meek, looking extremely depressed. She
doesn't even notice I'm there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That evening...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Erm...
choice_data_list: Meek?! Why are you alone? What happened?!
Meek?! Why are you alone? What happened?!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: She's gone...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: My trainer... I can't find her anywhere...
choice_data_list:
What?! Can you think where she might have
gone?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...I don't know.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
We only ever spoke about me... and the things I
like...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: So... I don't know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Happy Meek looks a little down, but from what
she's saying, I can tell how seriously Trainer
Kiryuin thinks about her trainee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Could that be a clue as to where she's gone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Where would someone who cares deeply about
her Umamusume go?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... She's really having a great time. I never
knew Meek liked aquariums so much.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...<username>?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seizing that one glimmer of hope, I hurry to the
aquarium with Happy Meek.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Meek?
And Trainer <username>?!
What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: We've been looking for you... Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Meek...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for making you worry. The last thing I
wanted to do was stress you out.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I really am a bad trainer, aren't I...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for all the trouble I've caused you as
well, Trainer <username>.
choice_data_list: Why did you come here alone?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to reflect on some things. Mostly on my
duties as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But the more I thought about it, the more
ashamed I felt of my own incompetence...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin's abilities are indisputable. Her
knowledge, backed up by the secrets of her
Trainer's Handbook, is unrivaled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And her love for Umamusume is beyond reproach.
If there's one thing she's lacking...
choice_data_list: Have you discussed your concerns with Meek?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: What? With Meek?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. I would never make my trainee
worry like that.
choice_data_list: Why would that be a problem?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
You're not the only one working hard, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But... But... it's my fault I'm useless. I can't force
Meek to deal with my failings...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: That's... not true...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: ...Meek?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: You're... not useless... You're my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: I want to talk to you... And not just about me...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: I want to learn about you, too.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
I want to do more to help you... because I want us
both to do our best... together.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Meek...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: ...What a mess.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm supposed to be the one supporting you, but
we've ended up the other way around...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I don't know what to say.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: What to say? Um... Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
How about... what food you want to eat today?
And... your favorite jellyfish? Things like that...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, Meek... Hehe! That's not what I mean.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
But I do want to hear those things. I want to work
hard with you from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer <username>.
It looks like you've taught me another
valuable lesson.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Meek, but could you wait over there for a
bit?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Just a bit?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Yes, just a bit. I'll be with you in a moment.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>...
I owe you a proper thank-you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So, if you don't mind... would you take my
Trainer's Handbook?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry it's a little worn out...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I am. This incident made me realize something.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm still too inexperienced to apply its teachings
properly.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
For the time being, I need to spend less time with
my nose in books...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...and more time looking straight at the
Umamusume in my care.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But for someone who already has their sights set
in the right direction, I'm sure it will be of great
help.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It's the collected wisdom of generations of the
Kiryuin family. Please take full advantage of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I receive the Trainer's Handbook from
Trainer Kiryuin, who seems like a weight has been
lifted from her shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This small yet weighty volume radiates pride and
passion passed down through generations of
trainers...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Well then, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Meek and I have a lot to talk about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch their figures recede into the distance, side
by side, until they're out of sight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the secret knowledge contained in the
Kiryuin family's Trainer Handbook,
<chrname> improves by leaps and
bounds!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Sorry. I'm going to talk to Meek now.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
We've got a lot to discuss... both about our
future... and about me.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Meek!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...All right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch them walk away, a little closer to one
another than before.
